title: 先允许自己躺一会
body:
先别急着上进，先允许自己在厕所里安静一会儿。

我们是 Holly Shit开心拉屎，来自一个很偶然的学生创作：一周赶出来的文创，在市集被很多人喜欢，也让我们确认——排泄不该只和羞耻有关，它也可以是身体权利和精神庇护。

首周期账号会先围绕「反焦虑的快乐哲学」展开，不劝你永远鸡血，只陪你合法躺平。

先主打3个角色产品：
①每天Shitting的打工人小女孩
②草丛里自由解决的小狗
③负责陪你放松的小猫

下一步会整理包装、内容方向和5篇笔记素材。你最想先看到哪一个角色？

note_draft.comment_hook: 你最想先看到小女孩、小狗还是小猫？

candidate_titles.rationale: 先给出松弛情绪，贴合反焦虑定位，短句容易停留。
用轻悬念表达品牌核心观点，引发好奇。
直接反常规，突出账号内容方向。
承接品牌名与口号，情绪明确、记忆点强。

main_images.subject: 椅子上的帆布包展示搞怪屎尿屁IP插画，适合文创产品种草
白色印花布包置于金属篮，展示搞怪屎尿屁IP元素
黑白颗粒感品牌海报，传达反完美主义与搞怪屎尿屁态度

aux_images.subject: 两款搞怪便签纸实拍，适合展示HollyShit文创产品与反焦虑幽默调性

text_points: 不羁 自信 有趣 搞怪
用最不体面的语言，说出人们最体面的诉求
厕所时间神圣不可侵犯
不要永远鸡血奋斗，请允许自己在厕所里合法躺平
brand_facts: “Holly Shit开心拉屎”设计品牌致力于把排泄从羞耻行为回归到身体权利与精神庇护。

cover_result.cover_path: /Users/geminilight/projects/product/Nori/cases/Holly/runs/20260531_025143_holly_live/covers/cover_综合通用_治愈笔记制作指南_20260531_030625.png
cover_result.prompt: Create a 3:4 vertical Xiaohongshu cover illustration with a healing, playful anti-anxiety mood. Use the two reference images as visual guidance and preserve the Holly Shit 开心拉屎 brand’s quirky character language and main brand elements, especially the little working-girl character and the playful poop/toilet-paper/body-right humor, but do not invent a new logo. The main subject should occupy about 60–75% of the canvas: a cute tired office girl character peacefully lying sideways on a giant soft toilet paper roll like a cloud bed, shoes kicked off, eyes relaxed, with a tiny puppy companion nearby; the scene feels like a gentle private shelter rather than explicit bathroom content. Composition: centered subject in the lower-middle, enough safe margin around all edges, clean negative space at the top for text. Color palette: warm cream, soft butter yellow, muted grass green, light peach, and gentle brown accents; soft diffused morning light, low contrast, cozy shadows. Style: whimsical hand-drawn editorial illustration, slightly goofy but comforting, rounded shapes, tactile paper texture, no photorealism. Add the main Chinese title text exactly: “先允许自己躺一会” in large rounded bold Chinese lettering at the upper left/top center, clearly the biggest text block; add one smaller auxiliary line beneath it: “给焦虑打工人的暂停键”. Keep typography clean and readable, not covering the character’s face or key details. No prices, no hard-sell advertising, no third-party certification badges, no app UI screenshots, no fake logos.

material_usage.text_preview: 我是一个同济大学设计创意学院的学生，因为一个很偶然的机会，我用一周的时间仓促的做了几个文创产品做的很好，大家都很喜欢，于是我打算继续做下去。现在市集可以卖的很好，但是线上卖不动，于是我想做个小红书账号，给大家分享我的文创的品牌理念和做产品的

material_usage.kind: IP小女孩、小狗、小猫草稿或成品图
